title: Export contact database to iPhone Contacts - vcf
excerpt:

posts.author: Deliddell (David Liddell)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there any possible way to take the information from a contact database in Monday and export it to Mac/iPhone vCard (vcf file)?

I have a contact information form that new employees fill out which populates our company database. But I’m still having to manually input the contact info into my phone and then send that to everyone.

I’m sure there is an easier way. Thanks!

posts.author: jennap (Jenna)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Deliddell ~ Welcome to the Community!

We do not have a way to export boards or information to vcf, but if you are looking to export board information from monday.com, then you can export your contacts board to Excel by following the steps within this article:

  • Excel Import and Export

From there, you can convert the Excel file as needed to the format you need

If these are individual files you are trying to take from a files column or the updates section, we only support the following file types in the platform:

  • PNG
  • JPEG
  • Word
  • PDF
  • Excel
  • GIF
  • MP4
  • SVG
  • TXT
  • AI

Check out this article for more details: How to manage my files in monday.com

I hope this helps!

Cheers,
Jenna

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
